{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = life (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Certain vegetables are woven with healing strands of life.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
